aweme_list.desc: Here are 5 European fintechs that are about to dominate 2025 👀 Europe’s fintech scene is heating up. Let’s look at 5 players you need to know: 1️⃣ Revolut — A super app doing crypto, stocks, FX, and more 2️⃣ Klarna — From BNPL to full shopping ecosystem 3️⃣ Qonto — Business banking that’s actually built for small businesses 4️⃣ Solaris — The invisible engine behind embedded finance in Europe 5️⃣ Plum — An AI-powered app helping people save & invest automatically These aren’t just apps. They’re building the future of how Europe moves money Follow @FintechBits every Thursday for Top 5 fintechs to watch worldwide. #top5 #europeanfintech #fintecheurope #fintech #DigitalBanking  #FinanceTok  #BaaS  #EmbeddedFinance  #SuperApp  #FintechBits #FintechTok

aweme_list.desc: Airwallex is one of fintech’s most underrated success stories. Four friends running a café in Melbourne got frustrated with expensive cross-border payments… So they built their own system. Not for customers. But for businesses moving money globally. Today, Airwallex powers thousands of brands, moves billions across borders, and is valued at over $5B. All by solving a real problem that banks ignored: Slow, expensive, messy international payments. The lesson? You don’t need a flashy idea. You just need a painful problem worth fixing. More Money Builders stories coming soon. Follow FintechBits. #fintech #airwallex #founderstory #startupstory #payments
